6.  **Final Polish**: Ensure no conversational filler. Keep it strictly markdown and code.# Edit Affiliate Partner Campaign API Guide

## 1. Purpose
Edit active affiliate partner campaign. Use to update details. Closed campaigns block edits.

## 2. Endpoint
*   **Method**: `POST`
*   **Path**: `/affiliate_partner/202405/campaigns/{campaign_id}/partial_edit`
